metadata.description: IOI topics with prerequisite ordering, colored by difficulty tier

nodes.label: Time & Space Complexity
nodes.description: Big-O, Big-Theta, Big-Omega notation; analyzing time and space complexity of algorithms

nodes.label: Arrays & Strings
nodes.description: Array manipulation, string basics, character arrays, indexing

nodes.label: Recursion & Backtracking
nodes.description: Recursive thinking, base cases, backtracking search, pruning

nodes.label: Comparison Sorting
nodes.description: Merge sort, quick sort, heap sort; O(n log n) comparison-based sorting

nodes.label: Linear-Time Sorting
nodes.description: Counting sort, radix sort, bucket sort; non-comparison sorting in O(n)

nodes.label: Binary Search
nodes.description: Binary search on sorted arrays; finding boundaries, lower/upper bound

nodes.label: Binary Search on Answer
nodes.description: Binary search the answer space; monotonic predicate functions; parametric search

nodes.label: Two Pointers
nodes.description: Two-pointer technique for sorted arrays, pair problems, merging

nodes.label: Sliding Window
nodes.description: Fixed and variable-size sliding window; deque-based sliding minimum/maximum

nodes.label: Prefix Sums
nodes.description: 1D and 2D prefix sums for O(1) range sum queries

nodes.label: Difference Arrays
nodes.description: Difference array technique for range update queries in O(1) amortized

nodes.label: Greedy Algorithms
nodes.description: Greedy strategies, exchange arguments, activity selection, scheduling

nodes.label: Bit Manipulation
nodes.description: Bitwise operations, bitmasks, subset enumeration, XOR properties

nodes.label: Stacks & Queues
nodes.description: Stack (LIFO), queue (FIFO), deque; monotonic stack and queue patterns

nodes.label: Linked Lists
nodes.description: Singly and doubly linked lists; insertion, deletion, traversal in O(1)/O(n)

nodes.label: Hash Tables & Hashing
nodes.description: Hash maps, hash sets, collision handling; polynomial hashing for strings

nodes.label: Binary Heap & Priority Queue
nodes.description: Min-heap, max-heap; priority queue operations; heapify in O(n)

nodes.label: Binary Search Trees
nodes.description: BST property, insertion, deletion, search, in-order traversal

nodes.label: Balanced BST (AVL, Red-Black)
nodes.description: Self-balancing BSTs: AVL trees, red-black trees; O(log n) guaranteed operations

nodes.label: Disjoint Set Union (DSU)
nodes.description: Union-Find with path compression and union by rank; near O(1) amortized

nodes.label: Fenwick Tree (BIT)
nodes.description: Binary Indexed Tree for prefix sum queries and point updates in O(log n)

nodes.label: Segment Tree
nodes.description: Segment tree for point update and range query; build, update, query in O(log n)

nodes.label: Segment Tree with Lazy Propagation
nodes.description: Range updates with lazy propagation; range add, range set, range query

nodes.label: Sparse Table & RMQ
nodes.description: Sparse table for O(1) static range minimum/maximum queries with O(n log n) preprocessing

nodes.label: Trie
nodes.description: Prefix tree for string storage and lookup; XOR trie for maximum XOR queries

nodes.label: Persistent Data Structures
nodes.description: Persistent segment tree and persistent arrays; accessing previous versions

nodes.label: Treap / Implicit Treap
nodes.description: Randomized BST combining heap and BST properties; implicit key treap for sequence operations

nodes.label: Graph Representation
nodes.description: Adjacency list, adjacency matrix, edge list; directed vs undirected, weighted graphs

nodes.label: Breadth-First Search (BFS)
nodes.description: BFS traversal, shortest path in unweighted graphs, level-order processing

nodes.label: Depth-First Search (DFS)
nodes.description: DFS traversal, discovery/finish times, edge classification, cycle detection

nodes.label: Topological Sort
nodes.description: Topological ordering of DAGs via DFS or Kahn's algorithm (BFS with in-degree)

nodes.label: Dijkstra's Algorithm
nodes.description: Single-source shortest paths with non-negative weights; priority queue implementation

nodes.label: Bellman-Ford / SPFA
nodes.description: Single-source shortest paths with negative edges; negative cycle detection; SPFA optimization

nodes.label: Floyd-Warshall
nodes.description: All-pairs shortest paths in O(V^3); transitive closure of a graph

nodes.label: MST - Kruskal's Algorithm
nodes.description: Minimum spanning tree via greedy edge selection with DSU

nodes.label: MST - Prim's Algorithm
nodes.description: Minimum spanning tree via priority queue vertex expansion

nodes.label: Strongly Connected Components
nodes.description: SCC decomposition via Tarjan's or Kosaraju's algorithm; condensation graph

nodes.label: Bridges & Articulation Points
nodes.description: Finding bridges and articulation points via DFS; biconnected components

nodes.label: Lowest Common Ancestor (LCA)
nodes.description: LCA via binary lifting, Euler tour + sparse table, or HLD; O(log n) per query

nodes.label: Euler Path & Circuit
nodes.description: Eulerian path/circuit existence conditions; Hierholzer's algorithm

nodes.label: Bipartite Graphs & 2-Coloring
nodes.description: Bipartiteness check via BFS/DFS; 2-coloring; odd cycle detection

nodes.label: Tree Diameter & Center
nodes.description: Finding diameter via two BFS/DFS; tree center, centroid decomposition basics

nodes.label: Heavy-Light Decomposition
nodes.description: HLD for path queries on trees combined with segment trees; O(log^2 n) per query

nodes.label: Centroid Decomposition
nodes.description: Centroid decomposition of trees; divide and conquer on tree paths; O(n log n)

nodes.label: 2-SAT
nodes.description: 2-SAT reduction to implication graph; solving via SCC decomposition

nodes.label: DP Introduction
nodes.description: Optimal substructure, overlapping subproblems, memoization vs tabulation

nodes.label: 1D Dynamic Programming
nodes.description: Fibonacci, coin change, staircase; single-parameter state DP

nodes.label: 2D Dynamic Programming
nodes.description: Grid DP, edit distance, two-parameter state DP, matrix path problems

nodes.label: Interval DP
nodes.description: DP on intervals/ranges; matrix chain multiplication, optimal BST, balloon burst

nodes.label: Knapsack Variants
nodes.description: 0/1 knapsack, unbounded knapsack, bounded knapsack; subset sum

nodes.label: Longest Increasing Subsequence
nodes.description: LIS in O(n log n) via patience sorting / binary search; variations and counting

nodes.label: Longest Common Subsequence
nodes.description: LCS via 2D DP; reconstructing the subsequence; space optimization

nodes.label: DP on DAGs
nodes.description: DP combined with topological sort on directed acyclic graphs; longest path in DAG

nodes.label: DP on Trees
nodes.description: Tree DP with subtree states; rerooting technique for computing answers for all roots

nodes.label: Bitmask DP
nodes.description: DP over subsets using bitmask representation; TSP, assignment problem, SOS DP

nodes.label: Digit DP
nodes.description: DP on digits for counting numbers with constraints in a range [L, R]

nodes.label: Probability & Expected Value DP
nodes.description: DP for computing probabilities and expected values; linearity of expectation

nodes.label: Profile DP (Broken Profile)
nodes.description: DP on grid with bitmask profile; tiling problems, plug DP

nodes.label: Convex Hull Trick
nodes.description: Optimizing DP recurrences of the form dp[i] = min(dp[j] + b[j]*a[i]); Li Chao tree

nodes.label: Divide & Conquer DP Optimization
nodes.description: Optimizing DP when the optimal split point is monotone; reducing O(n^3) to O(n^2 log n)

nodes.label: Knuth's Optimization
nodes.description: Optimizing interval DP when cost satisfies quadrangle inequality; O(n^2) from O(n^3)

nodes.label: KMP Algorithm
nodes.description: Knuth-Morris-Pratt pattern matching; failure function; O(n+m) string search

nodes.label: Z-Function
nodes.description: Z-function for pattern matching and string periodicity; O(n) computation

nodes.label: String Hashing (Rabin-Karp)
nodes.description: Polynomial rolling hash for substring comparison; Rabin-Karp pattern matching

nodes.label: Suffix Array & LCP
nodes.description: Suffix array construction in O(n log n); LCP array; substring search and counting

nodes.label: Aho-Corasick
nodes.description: Multi-pattern string matching automaton; dictionary matching in O(n + m + z)

nodes.label: Manacher's Algorithm
nodes.description: Finding all palindromic substrings in O(n); longest palindromic substring

nodes.label: Convex Hull
nodes.description: Convex hull algorithms: Graham scan, Andrew's monotone chain; O(n log n)

nodes.label: Sweep Line
nodes.description: Sweep line technique for geometry problems; closest pair, rectangle union area

nodes.label: Point in Polygon
nodes.description: Ray casting, winding number; point containment tests for simple polygons

nodes.label: Geometry Primitives
nodes.description: Cross product, dot product, line intersection, segment intersection, polygon area

nodes.label: Modular Arithmetic
nodes.description: Modular addition, multiplication, exponentiation; modular inverse via Fermat/extended GCD

nodes.label: GCD & Extended Euclidean
nodes.description: Euclidean algorithm, extended GCD, solving ax + by = gcd(a,b)

nodes.label: Sieve of Eratosthenes
nodes.description: Prime sieve, linear sieve, smallest prime factor; prime factorization

nodes.label: Chinese Remainder Theorem
nodes.description: CRT for solving systems of modular equations; coprime and general case

nodes.label: Euler's Totient Function
nodes.description: Euler's phi function; computing totient; Euler's theorem for modular exponentiation

nodes.label: Combinatorics
nodes.description: Binomial coefficients, Pascal's triangle, Catalan numbers, inclusion-exclusion

nodes.label: Matrix Exponentiation
nodes.description: Matrix power in O(n^3 log k) for linear recurrences; Fibonacci, graph path counting

nodes.label: Max Flow (Ford-Fulkerson, Dinic)
nodes.description: Maximum flow: Ford-Fulkerson method, Edmonds-Karp BFS, Dinic's O(V^2 E) algorithm

nodes.label: Min Cut
nodes.description: Max-flow min-cut theorem; finding minimum cut from residual graph

nodes.label: Bipartite Matching
nodes.description: Maximum bipartite matching via Hopcroft-Karp or Kuhn's algorithm; Konig's theorem

nodes.label: Min-Cost Max-Flow
nodes.description: Minimum cost maximum flow; successive shortest paths with SPFA/Bellman-Ford

nodes.label: Game Theory (Sprague-Grundy)
nodes.description: Nim, Sprague-Grundy theorem, Grundy values, composite games with XOR

nodes.label: Sqrt Decomposition
nodes.description: Block decomposition for range queries; O(sqrt(n)) per query; block updates

nodes.label: Mo's Algorithm
nodes.description: Offline range query processing in O((n + q) sqrt(n)); Mo's algorithm with updates

nodes.label: FFT / NTT
nodes.description: Fast Fourier Transform for polynomial multiplication in O(n log n); Number Theoretic Transform

nodes.label: Offline Query Techniques
nodes.description: Query sorting, CDQ divide and conquer, parallel binary search, offline deletions

nodes.label: Interactive Problems
nodes.description: Adaptive strategies, query budgets, binary search in interactive settings

nodes.label: Small-to-Large Merging
nodes.description: DSU on tree (small-to-large merging); merging sets efficiently in O(n log n) total
